articles.title: Clarity Act could spark a boom in crypto ‘yield-as-a-service’
articles.description: The bill’s restrictions on yield-bearing crypto products may push the industry away from passive "hold-to-earn" models and toward AI-driven, compliant yield infrastructure, according to STBL Chief Commercial Officer Joe Vollono.

articles.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
articles.description: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

articles.title: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing financial stability risks
articles.description: The ECB warned EU finance ministers that expanding euro stablecoin issuance could weaken bank lending and complicate monetary policy.

articles.title: Bitcoin tanks to $74,300 as spot ETFs bleed $2.26 billion in two weeks
articles.description: U.S.-listed spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds have seen more than $2.26 billion in outflows over the past two weeks.
